loading.title.description: Title of the full-page loading state while payment methods are being fetched.

loading.description.description: Subtitle under the payment-methods loading state.

creditCards.heading.description: Section heading above the saved credit-card grid on the payment methods page.

creditCards.addButton.description: Button that opens the dialog to add a new credit card.

creditCards.cardHolderFallback.description: Fallback card-holder name shown on a card when no name/email/wallet is available.

creditCards.empty.title.description: Empty-state title shown when the user has no saved payment methods.

creditCards.empty.description.description: Empty-state body inviting the user to add a payment method.

creditCards.toast.saveError.description: Toast shown when saving a new payment method fails.

creditCards.toast.deleteSuccess.description: Toast confirming a payment method was deleted.

creditCards.toast.deleteError.description: Toast shown when deleting a payment method fails.

creditCards.deleteDialog.title.description: Title of the confirm-delete dialog for a saved card.

creditCards.deleteDialog.description.description: Confirm-delete dialog body. {brand} is the card brand (e.g. Visa, Mastercard) and {last4} is the last four card digits — keep both untranslated.

wallets.heading.description: Section heading above the linked-wallets grid on the payment methods page.

wallets.linkButton.description: Button that starts the flow to link a new wallet.

wallets.showInWallet.description: Wallet card action button that adds/shows the NFSC token in the user's wallet. 'NFSC' is a token symbol — keep untranslated.

wallets.addFunds.description: Wallet card action button that opens the flow to add funds / charge the wallet.

wallets.empty.title.description: Empty-state title shown when the user has no linked wallets.

wallets.empty.description.description: Empty-state body inviting the user to add a wallet.

wallets.actionDescription.addToken.description: Phrase describing the requested wallet action: adding the NFSC token to the wallet. Shown inside a wallet-connection request prompt. 'NFSC' is a token symbol — keep untranslated.

wallets.actionDescription.charge.description: Phrase describing the requested wallet action: charging the wallet. Shown inside a wallet-connection request prompt.

wallets.toast.requestSentTitle.description: Toast title confirming a request was sent to the user's wallet.

wallets.toast.requestSentDescription.description: Toast body asking the user to check their wallet to add the NFSC token. 'NFSC' is a token symbol — keep untranslated.

wallets.toast.addTokenSuccess.description: Toast confirming the NFSC token was added to the wallet. 'NFSC' is a token symbol — keep untranslated.

wallets.toast.addTokenError.description: Toast shown when adding the NFSC token to the wallet failed. 'NFSC' is a token symbol — keep untranslated.

wallets.toast.addTokenFailedTitle.description: Toast title shown when adding a token to the wallet failed (paired with the error detail).

wallets.toast.unknownError.description: Fallback error detail used as a toast description when no specific error message is available.

wallets.toast.prepareActionError.description: Toast shown when preparing a wallet action (connection request) failed.

saveDialog.title.description: Title of the dialog for entering new payment-method (card) details.

saveDialog.description.description: Subtitle of the save-payment-method dialog prompting the user to enter details.

saveDialog.submit.description: Submit button that saves the entered payment method.

saveDialog.processing.description: Submit-button label while the payment method is being saved/processed.

saveDialog.genericError.description: Generic fallback error shown when Stripe setup fails without a specific message.

saveDialog.unexpectedError.description: Error shown when an unexpected exception occurs while saving the payment method.
